provenance.prompt: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter, flat graphic design wallpaper showing exactly sixteen identical simple line-art coffee cup icons arranged in a four-by-four grid on a pale neutral grey background, each icon identical black outline on white fill, equal spacing, clean vector look, no shadow, no gradient, no background texture
provenance.negative_prompt: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
